author: IGN YouTube
text:
Mandalorian Body Double Teaches IGN Audience How to Walk Like a Space Cowboy | IGN Live 2026
The Mandalorian's body double (and John Wayne's grandson) Brendan Wayne stopped by IGN Live to talk about his favorite moments from his time in the armor, and taught some lucky audience members how to swagger like a real space cowboy. Check out the interview here!

#IGN #IGNLive #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
New Fallout & Helldivers 2 Figures Revealed by Todd McFarlane Himself -  IGN Live 2026
Todd McFarlane swung by IGN live to reveal a few brand new action figures based on some awesome video games. Fallout fans get treated to new 7-inch super-articulated figures based on not one but three different games: Fallout 76, Fallout 4 and Fallout New Vegas, including a few iconic NPCs, Paladin Danse and Joshua Graham. Meanwhile, McFarlane’s mobilization of Helldivers 2 continues with Elite figures of the CE-35 Trench Engineer and B-01 Tactical - the first of (hopefully) many new collectibles based on PlayStation Studios’ library of games. Plus, what he thinks of Spawn in future Mortal Kombat projects, and the state of the Blumhouse Spawn movie.

#IGN #IGNLive #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Poppy Playtime's Lily Lovebraids and Giblet Answer Your Questions - IGN Live 2026
Poppy Playtime characters Lily Lovebraids and Giblet (Nicole Tompkins and Elliot Schiff) show off their community questions video, answer some of your questions from the IGN Live audience, and also decide which IRL toys, like Labubu and DJ Furby, would help the player in Poppy Playtime or align with The Prototype.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
30 Years of Hell: Blizzard Looks Back on the Diablo Franchise | IGN Live 2026
If you can believe it, it's been 30 years since the original Diablo came out for PC. Together, IGN and Blizzard are celebrating both their 30 year anniversaries as they discuss what's to come from their latest entries to the franchise.

#IGN #IGNLive #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
How Much Do These Home Entertainment Items Cost Now? – IGN Live 2026
We’re giving away a bunch of home entertainment items today here at IGN LIVE, and it's up to these fine people on stage to guess how much each item costs. The closest without going over the MSRP wins it on the spot. 

Sony Ult Field 1 Wireless Speaker - 
The party never stops with up to 30 hours of battery life with quick charging and
water, dust, rust, and shockproof design. Enjoy endless hours of good music with
your favorite people.


JBL PartyBox Portable Speaker - 
Delivering up to 18 hours of playtime, strobe effects, mic and guitar inputs, this speaker transforms any space, inside or outdoors, into a dance floor. 

 Samsung 55” TV - 
With the AI-powered processor, your favorite shows, movies and games come to
life with incredible depth, realism and audio quality, while SDR content gets
automatically remastered to look like HDR. Plus, discover endless content with
thousands of video games and free channels.

Victrola Turntable
Featuring a 3-speed turntable, CD player, and Bluetooth® technology, the Victrola Century Essential 5-in-1 music center brings elegant mid-century design to the all-in-one entertainment center.

Sonos Soundbar
Upgrade your TV, music, and gaming experiences with this impressively compact
and easy-to-use soundbar. Experience precisely balanced sound, including crisp
dialogue and solid bass, plus streamlined control with your TV remote, the Sonos
app, Apple AirPlay 2, and more.

LG 48” Smart TV OLED
Whether you game on consoles or on the cloud,³ the LG Game Dashboard and Game Optimizer put all the control at your fingertips. You'll be able to keep pace with the action with a native 120Hz refresh rate for smoother movement whether you're gaming or watching sports.

#IGN #IGNLive #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Dog Stars - Official Trailer 2 (2026) Jacob Elordi, Josh Brolin, Margaret Qualley
Take a look at the Official Trailer 2 for The Dog Stars, a sci-fi dystopian survival drama distributed by 20th Century Studios. Fear the survivors in The Dog Stars, in theaters on August 28.

The Dog Stars tells the tale of Hig, a young pilot who, together with a military survivalist, Bangley, has carved out an efficient but isolated homestead in a brutal post-apocalyptic world. But when Hig receives a mysterious radio transmission, he ventures into the unknown in search of the hope and humanity he still believes exist.

The Dog Stars stars Jacob Elordi, Josh Brolin, Margaret Qualley, Allison Janney, Benedict Wong, and Guy Pearce. The screenplay is by Mark L. Smith, based upon the novel by Peter Heller, and the producers are Ridley Scott, p.g.a., Michael Pruss, p.g.a., Mark L. Smith, and Cliff Roberts, p.g.a., with Lily Brooks-Dalton, Brandon Scott Smith, Peter Heller, Aidan Elliott serving as executive producers.

The Dog Stars is in theaters on August 28.

#TheDogStars #Movies #IGN

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Into the Wind - Official Announcement Trailer
Check out the Into The Wind announcement trailer for this upcoming cozy adventure game, where you take to the skies on their sentient motorcycle-plane companion Ermes as they explore the magical Adriatic islands of Santa Rosa. Into the Wind will be available on PC.

In the Studio Ghibli-inspired world of Into the Wind, players inherit their uncle Umberto's delivery firm as they attempt to solve the mystery of his disappearance. Along the way, they'll make friends with the island's colourful residents, customise their bike and home, battle rowdy air pirates and discover the freedom of life among the clouds in a heartfelt adventure inspired by the joy of the journey itself.

text:
The future of Xbox is bright. Presented by @ObsidianEnt #ignsummerofgaming
Subscribe to IGN for more!
http://www.youtube.com/user/IGNentertainment?sub_confirmation=1

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Sunset Survival: Miami - Official Reveal Trailer
Sunset Survival: Miami is a just-announced top-down PvE survival shooter. Collect vital resources, find powerful equipment, and fight off diverse mutant enemies. Wishlist it on Steam if you're interested: https://store.steampowered.com/app/4747280/Sunset_Survival_Miami/

#SunsetSurvivalMiami #Gaming #IGN

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Halo: Campaign Evolved - Official Cinematic Story Trailer
Check out the Halo: Campaign Evolved cinematic story trailer. After crash landing on a mysterious ringworld known as Halo, the Master Chief is tasked with defending humanity against an overwhelming alien force: the Covenant. With the help of his AI companion Cortana, the Chief must uncover Halo’s dark secrets and fight to avert the annihilation of all life in the galaxy.

Halo: Campaign Evolved will be available on Xbox Series X|S, PC, and PlayStation 5 (PS5) on July 28, 2026. Pre-orders of the Premium Edition or Collector’s Edition grant up to 5 days early access beginning July 23, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Mina the Hollower - How to Get to the Upper Level of Ossex (Secret Shops!)
Want to reach the Mina the Hollower Trinket shop in Ossex City, but don’t know how? We’ll show you how to reach Upper Ossex from the West Entrance in this quick guide! Mina the Hollower released on May 28, 2026 and is available for Nintendo Switch, Switch 2, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and Steam.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
2XKO - Official The Climb: New PVE Mode Reveal Trailer
Challenge deadly enemies and discover powerful augments in 2XKO's new PVE game mode, The Climb. Watch the latest 2XKO trailer for the free-to-play fighting game from Riot Games, to see what to expect with The Climb PVE game mode. Fight 2v2, adapt your strategy, and unlock PVE-only abilities in each new encounter. Every run is unique. Play solo or team up with a friend and ascend to the top. Complete beginner, intermediate, and advanced difficulty levels with each champion to earn rewards, including exclusive chromas. The Climb will be playable beginning June 9 in 2XKO.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves - Official Season 3 Animated Teaser
Welcome back to South Town! With the upcoming release of Kenshiro in June, Fatal Fury City of the Wolves is coming to an end of the 2nd Season of content and seems to be gearing up for a third! This animated teaser strongly hints that Real Bout Fatal Fury 2 boxer Rick Strowd will be joining the roster in Season 3! 

Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves is available now on PlayStation 5 (PS5), PlayStation 4 (PS4), Xbox Series X/S, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Jurassic World Evolution 3 - Official Undisclosed Location Teaser
Watch the Jurassic World Evolution 3 Undisclosed Location teaser for the dinosaur park simulation game. Jurassic World Evolution 3 is available now for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Samson - Official 'Welcome To The Pit' Free Update Trailer
Watch the latest Samson trailer to see what's coming with the free content update, Welcome to The Pit. The Welcome to The Pit update brings a new area of the map called the Lowline Circuit Race Track, vehicle customization, taxi gigs, and new jobs to the action-adventure game. The Welcome to The Pit update for Samson will be available on PC on June 9, 2026.

Samson returns to Tyndalston, a city that shaped him hard, where every fight is close and every escape is earned. He owes dangerous people more than he can pay, and they’re using his sister to force his hand. The clock is ticking. The only way out is through anyone who stands in his way.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Mortal Kombat II - Exclusive Opening Scene (2026) Adeline Rudolph
In New Line Cinema's Mortal Kombat 2, the fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

Karl Urban stars as Johnny Cage, alongside Adeline Rudolph, Jessica McNamee, Josh Lawson, Ludi Lin, Mehcad Brooks, Tati Gabrielle, Lewis Tan, Damon Herriman, with Chin Han, Tadanobu Asano as Lord Raiden, Joe Taslim as Bi-Han, and Hiroyuki Sanada as Hanzo Hasashi and Scorpion.

Mortal Kombat II arrives on digital platforms on June 9, 2026 and on 4K, Blu-ray and DVD on July 28.

#IGN #Movies #MortalKombat

#IGN #IGNLive #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Where the Hell Is Naughty Dog?
For decades, Naughty Dog was the king of triple-A, pushing Playstation hardware to its absolute technical limits, from detailed environments and expressive characters on the PS1 with Crash Bandicoot, to cinematic masterpieces on PS3 and PS4 like Uncharted and The Last of Us. But at this year's summer showcases, Sony's most legendary first-party studio was completely missing in action – leaving fans wondering exactly how far away its next title, Intergalactic: The Heretic Prophet, might be. So, in an era where the current-gen consoles have been spinning their wheels, why has Naughty Dog been benched?

From Sony’s multi-billion-dollar obsession with chasing the live-service trend to a mass exodus of its top team, Naughty Dog has seemingly been caught in a perfect storm of publisher hubris and a big chunk of its talent simply leaving for pastures new. Can Naughty Dog recover from this, and are they set for a major return to form on PlayStation 6?

Jim Trinca is a Video Producer at IGN, and when he isn't fawning over Assassin's Creed, he can be found watching Star Trek and eating stuff. Follow him on  @jimtrinca.bsky.social , and check out  The Trinca Perspective  playlist over on IGN's YouTube channel!

#NaughtyDog #Gaming #IGN
